summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin AI Training & Content Management features for Speakking. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). All 6 admin dashboard tabs tested and working correctly via Playwright UI tests.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoints (100%)
Backend: Admin login with admin@speakking.com / admin123
Backend: POST /api/admin/sentences - Create sentence
Backend: POST /api/admin/sentences/bulk - Bulk create sentences
Backend: PUT /api/admin/sentences/{id} - Update sentence
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/sentences/{id} - Delete sentence
Backend: GET /api/admin/sentences?level=A1 - Filter by level
Backend: POST /api/admin/documents/upload - Upload TXT document
Backend: GET /api/admin/documents - List documents
Backend: GET /api/admin/documents/{id}/content - Get document content
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/documents/{id} - Delete document
Backend: Upload unsupported file type returns 400
Backend: GET /api/admin/ai-config - Get AI config
Backend: PUT /api/admin/ai-config - Update system prompt
Backend: Toggle sentence bank on/off
Backend: Toggle documents on/off
Backend: Update max sentences per lesson
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings - Get settings
Backend: Update daily limit, teacher tone, speech speed
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - List all users (no password exposed)
Backend: GET /api/scenarios - List scenarios
Backend: GET /api/scenarios?level=A1 - Filter by level
Backend: POST /api/scenarios - Create new topic
Backend: DELETE /api/scenarios/{id} - Delete topic
Frontend: Admin login via auth modal
Frontend: Navigate to /admin route
Frontend: Müfredat (Curriculum) tab - Level cards A1-C2 with topics
Frontend: Müfredat - 'Yeni Konu Ekle' modal with level selector
Frontend: Müfredat - Quick add topic via inline input
Frontend: Cümle Bankası tab - List sentences with TR/EN pairs
Frontend: Cümle Bankası - Add sentence modal with form fields
Frontend: Cümle Bankası - 'Cümle eklendi' toast on success
Frontend: Cümle Bankası - Search and level filter controls
Frontend: Cümle Bankası - 'Toplu Ekle' bulk import button
Frontend: Dokümanlar tab - Empty state with upload instructions
Frontend: Dokümanlar - 'Doküman Yükle' button visible
Frontend: AI Eğitimi tab - Status cards (sentences, documents, per lesson)
Frontend: AI Eğitimi - System prompt textarea
Frontend: AI Eğitimi - Toggle switches for sentence bank and documents
Frontend: AI Eğitimi - Max sentences slider
Frontend: AI Eğitimi - 'Kaydet' save button
Frontend: Kullanıcılar tab - User table with columns
Frontend: Kullanıcılar - Admin and student roles displayed
Frontend: Ayarlar tab - Daily limit slider
Frontend: Ayarlar - Teacher tone dropdown (Arkadaşça/Resmi/Teşvik Edici)
Frontend: Ayarlar - Speech speed dropdown (Yavaş/Normal/Hızlı)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard has 6 tabs: Müfredat (Curriculum), Cümle Bankası (Sentence Bank), Dokümanlar (Documents), AI Eğitimi (AI Config), Kullanıcılar (Users), Ayarlar (Settings). All CRUD operations for sentences, documents, scenarios, and AI config are working. Login via 'Başla' button on landing page, then navigate to /admin. Test credentials: admin@speakking.com / admin123. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_features.py covers all admin API endpoints.
